text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
242 
SPLMTL_DSB_LTSS 
LABEL: 
Beneficiary LTSS Record in Supplemental Disability File 
DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there is record in the disability and need supplemental file for this person that 
includes Long-Term Services and Supports (LTSS) data. 
SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_DSB_LTSS 
LONG NAME: SPLMTL_DSB_LTSS 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
Annual DE base
